mapper.select: SELECT A.rspns_no, A.rspns_dtm, A.actn_type_rslt, B.type_nm, C.emp_nm, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(B.type_cn, 4000, 1) AS "typeCn" FROM RSPNS A INNER JOIN BEHAVIOR_TYPE B ON A.actn_type_rslt = B.type_cd INNER JOIN EMP C ON A.rspnr_emp_no = C.emp_no WHERE A.trgt_emp_no = #{empNo} AND A.test_no = ( SELECT MAX(TEST_NO) FROM RSPNS WHERE TRGT_EMP_NO = #{empNo} ) ORDER BY A.rspns_dtm DESC
